Scaffold a new Markdown content file

Usage:
  nectar new [--config <path>] [--force] [--slug <slug>] [--draft] [--date <iso>] [--tags <a,b,c>] [--author <slug>] [--open] [--json] <kind> <title...>

Arguments:
  kind                Content kind to scaffold. Built-ins are post, page, tag, and author; additional kinds come from [content.kinds] and the active theme package config.content_kinds manifest.
  title               Title (post/page/custom kinds) or slug (tag/author); variadic so quoting is optional for multi-word titles

Options:
  -c, --config <path> Config path(s); repeat or comma-separate to deep-merge in order
  --force             Overwrite the destination file if it already exists
  --slug <slug>       Use this lowercase ASCII slug instead of one derived from the title (post/page/custom kinds only; must match /^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*$/; for tag/author the positional already is the slug)
  --draft             Set frontmatter status to "draft" so the file is excluded from builds until promoted (post/page only)
  --date <iso>        Override the published date with an ISO-8601 timestamp instead of the current time (post only)
  --tags <a,b,c>      Tag slugs to seed in frontmatter (post only); repeat or comma-separate
  --author <slug>     Author slug to seed in frontmatter (post only)
  --open              Open the created file in $VISUAL or $EDITOR after writing it (logs the path when neither is set)
  -j, --json          Emit the result (created path, slug, kind) as JSON on stdout instead of the human "Created ..." line
  -h, --help          Show help for this command

Environment variables:
  Every flag has an env var fallback (CLI flag > env var > config > default).
  Naming: NECTAR_<COMMAND>_<FLAG> (uppercased, dashes become underscores).
  Example: --config → NECTAR_NEW_CONFIG

Repeated flags:
  Scalar string flags use the last value.
  List-style string flags accumulate as comma-separated values in argv order.
  Boolean flags use the last positive or negated spelling.

Examples:
  nectar new post "Hello World"               # content/posts/hello-world.md
  nectar new post "日本語タイトル" --slug japanese-title
  nectar new post "Draft Idea" --draft        # status: draft so the build skips it
  nectar new post "Tagged" --tags news,tech --author jane
  nectar new tag releases                      # content/tags/releases.md
  nectar new author jane                       # content/authors/jane.md
  nectar new event "Launch Party"              # custom kind from config/theme manifest
